title: Chewy Quevaled Garlicky Queved Stew
description: A chewy Portuguese dish featuring whole black peppercorns, poached in a flavorful broth. Kosher-friendly and ready in under an hour.
instructions: Preheat a hot-stone-plate to medium-high heat.
Season chicken with kosher salt and place on hot-stone-plate.
Sauté onions, garlic, celery, and bell peppers until softened.
Add broth (enough to cover all ingredients) to the hot-stone-plate, bringing to a simmer.
Gently poach the chicken in the broth for about 25 minutes.
Stir in potato chunks and black peppercorns. Reduce heat to low.
Cover with a lid or a sheet of parchment paper and let cook for another 15 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
